memberdef.argsstring: (this, field_name, description, units, data_type, process_name, diagnostic_species, diagnostic_species_id, rc)
memberdef.name: diag_field_create

briefdescription.para: Create and configure a diagnostic field.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the process owning this diagnostic
Optional array of species names for diagnostics
Optional array of species indices for diagnostics

briefdescription.para: Initialize data storage for diagnostic field.
Check if diagnostic field is ready for use.
Check if field should be output at current time.

detaileddescription.para: This is a generic interface that processes can use to update their diagnostics

briefdescription.para: Reset diagnostic field data to zero/default values.
